name: Hybrid Recall Context Loader
description: A deterministic Buddy hybrid recall tool that searches buddy_messages and memory_entries, then returns one auditable context_package with source refs, retrieval metadata, budget metadata, and warnings.

inputSchema.name: Query
inputSchema.description: Search query used to find Buddy history messages and structured memories.

inputSchema.name: Current Session ID
inputSchema.description: Optional current Buddy session id; matching lineage is excluded from session discover results.

inputSchema.name: Embedding Model Ref
inputSchema.description: Optional embedding model id/provider:model to enable hybrid memory and session recall.

inputSchema.name: Reranker Model Ref
inputSchema.description: Optional reranker provider/model ref used to rerank hybrid recall candidates.

inputSchema.name: Window
inputSchema.description: Message window around each session hit.

inputSchema.name: Bookend
inputSchema.description: Number of session bookend messages to include.

inputSchema.name: Role Filter
inputSchema.description: Optional roles to search, usually user and assistant.

inputSchema.name: Status
inputSchema.description: Memory status filter; defaults to active.

inputSchema.name: Max Chars
inputSchema.description: Maximum rendered hybrid recall context characters.

outputSchema.name: Hybrid Recall Context
outputSchema.description: Combined session and memory recall context_package.

outputSchema.name: Hybrid Recall Report
outputSchema.description: Search query, memory ids, message ids, source refs, retrieval modes, budget, and warnings.
